zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Bratton於1373年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Peter Bratton32歲，母親Mrs. Peter Bratton31歲。他和Joan De Sydenham至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1467年3月26日在他的家鄉享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Bratton于1373年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Peter Bratton32岁，母亲Mrs. Peter Bratton31岁。他和Joan De Sydenham至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1467年3月26日在他的家乡享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bratton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Bratten (in Shropshire, Somerset, and Wiltshire) or from Bratton Clovelly or Bratton Fleming in Devon. The Shropshire and Somerset places are named with Old English brōc ‘brook’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The Wiltshire and Devon names are from Old English brǣc ‘newly cultivated ground’ + tūn.

variants.name: Bratten
meanings: Swedish (Brattén): ornamental name composed of the personal name Bratt + the adjectival suffix -én, from Latin -enius ‘relating to’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Bratton was born in 1373, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Peter Bratton, was 32 and his mother, Mrs. Peter Bratton, was 31. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Joan De Sydenham. He died on 26 March 1467, in his hometown, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Bratton est né en 1373, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter Bratton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Peter Bratton, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Joan De Sydenham. Il est décédé le 26 mars 1467, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Bratton 1373 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter Bratton 32 und seine Mutter Mrs. Peter Bratton 31. Er hatte mit Joan De Sydenham mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. März 1467 im Alter von 94 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bratton è nato il nel 1373 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Peter Bratton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Peter Bratton, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Joan De Sydenham. Morì il 26 marzo 1467, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 94 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Bratton(이)가 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Bratton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Peter Bratton(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Joan De Sydenham(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 3월 26일 그의 고향에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bratton nasceu em 1373, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter Bratton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Peter Bratton, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Joan De Sydenham. Ele faleceu em 26 de março de 1467, em sua cidade natal, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Bratton родился в 1373 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Peter Bratton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Peter Bratton, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Joan De Sydenham. Он умер 26 марта 1467 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 94 лет.
